entry.value: Exception occurred while executing the RPCRequest: Errors returned from IQService. "A device attached to the system is not functioning. A device attached to the system is not functioning. 00000523: SysErr: DSID-031A12C8, problem 22 (Invalid argument), data 0 00000523: SysErr: DSID-031A12C8, problem 22 (Invalid argument), data 0 . HRESULT:[0x8007001F]"
